title: coryanthes lachuensis
intro: Coryanthes lachuensis, also known as the Orchid of the Andes, is a type of epiphytic orchid native to the Andes mountain range in South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Coryanthes lachuensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve breathing, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory diseases. Herbal preparations of Coryanthes lachuensis typically involve drying and powdering the plant's roots and leaves, which can then be consumed as a tea or capsule to harness its medicinal properties.
